title: taraxacum acrophilum
intro: Taraxacum acrophilum, also known as the alpine dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acrophilum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum acrophilum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
